calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-16-2016 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar May-16-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Department 206 for Short Cause Trial/Prove Up. Department 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Arash Moussavian, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff TD Bank USA, N.A.,
No appearance by or on behalf of Defendant Judy Huynh.
Declaration of Plaintiff pursuant to CCP 98, submitted in lieu of personal testimony on file.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-10 dismissed without prejudice.

After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff TD Bank USA, N.A. and against Defendant Judy Huynh as follows:
Principal $5832.10
Pre-Judgment Interest $0.00
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $281.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $6,113.10

Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-12-2016 Set For Trial On May-16-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
